context: Fourth QA run (revision 3). The separate .archive-preset-filters container was removed. Preset pills now render as non-interactive <span class='archive-preset-pill'> INSIDE .archive-active-filters alongside interactive user-selected buttons. When displayFilters=false, no pill UI is shown at all. CSS :not(:has()) rule hides the bar when neither pill type is present.

build.notes: TypeScript compilation clean. Lint errors only in unrelated blocks (MainWrapper, FullWidthMedia, TestimonialsCarousel). Two pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in Archive.tsx at lines 81 and 104 remain (FQA-001, non-blocking, known).  Archive-specific build artifacts clean.

requirements.description: When displayFilters=true with presets: ONE active filters bar containing both preset spans (no X) and user-selected buttons (with X)
requirements.evidence: Section 14 ('Preset Filtered Resources', displayFilters=true, data-preset-filters='{"audience":["students"]}'): activeFiltersBar=true (count:1), presetPillSpan=true (count:1), interactivePillButton=false (no user-added terms at page load — correct), separatePresetContainer=false. PHP Archive.php lines 320-346: .archive-active-filters rendered under condition '$show_filters && $displayFilters'. Inside, preset terms branch to <span class='archive-preset-pill'> (lines 331-334) and non-preset terms branch to <button data-field data-value> (lines 336-339). JS buildButtons() (lines 279-337) rebuilds both pill types client-side after filter interactions.

requirements.description: No separate .archive-preset-filters container exists anywhere in rendered HTML
requirements.evidence: separatePresetContainer (.archive-preset-filters) is false across all 16 sections in the page audit. The .archive-preset-filters div has been fully removed from Archive.php. Confirmed: no .archive-preset-filters selector anywhere in the rendered DOM.

requirements.description: When displayFilters=false with presets: NO pills shown at all (presets apply silently)
requirements.evidence: Section 15 ('Curated Resources', displayFilters=false, data-preset-filters='{"audience":["students"]}'): activeFiltersBar=false, presetPillSpan=false, interactivePillButton=false, separatePresetContainer=false. PHP condition for .archive-active-filters at line 320 is '$show_filters && $displayFilters' — when displayFilters=false, $show_filters=false, so the entire filter UI (including the active filters bar) is not rendered. Presets still apply silently to WP_Query and data-preset-filters is still output on the section element ('{"audience":["students"]}') for JS to read.

requirements.description: Clear All clears user pills but preset spans reappear after rebuild
requirements.evidence: Archive.js lines 215-234: Clear All handler on form click (a) calls removeFilterFromButton on all 'button[data-field]' — this targets only interactive buttons, not preset spans which have no data-field attribute; (b) resets all hidden inputs to empty (line 221); (c) restores preset values via Object.keys(presetFilters) iteration (lines 225-229), re-setting hidden input values; (d) calls updateState(true) which calls buildButtons() — buildButtons() re-renders preset spans via lines 304-316 (insertAdjacentHTML of <span class='archive-preset-pill'>) for any preset values that are active in the hidden inputs. AJAX reload from server also re-outputs preset spans in .archive-active-filters innerHTML.

requirements.description: CSS hide rule works: bar hides when no pills of either type exist
requirements.evidence: Archive.css line 32: '.archive-active-filters:not(:has(button[data-field], .archive-preset-pill)) { display: none; }'. This CSS :not(:has()) selector hides the bar whenever there are no interactive button[data-field] pills AND no .archive-preset-pill spans. Page audit confirms sections 0-13 (no presets, no user selections) have .archive-active-filters in the DOM but contain only the Clear All button — the CSS rule hides them. Section 14 (presets active) has presetPillSpan=true so the bar is visible. Section 15 (displayFilters=false) has no .archive-active-filters in the DOM at all.

taktician_validate_all: TypeScript build clean. Lint errors are all in other blocks (MainWrapper, FullWidthMedia, TestimonialsCarousel). Archive-specific lint is clean. Two pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in Archive.tsx (lines 81, 104) are known non-blocking issues (FQA-001).

preExistingIssues.description: Two pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in Archive.tsx at lines 81 and 104. Non-blocking.

keyCodeChanges.php: Lines 320-346: .archive-active-filters rendered only when '$show_filters && $displayFilters'. Inside, preset terms render as <span class='archive-preset-pill'>, user terms as <button data-field data-value>. .archive-preset-filters div fully removed.
keyCodeChanges.js_buildButtons: Lines 304-316: presetValues rendered as insertAdjacentHTML <span class='archive-preset-pill'>. Lines 319-333: userValues (non-preset) rendered as interactive <button>. Lines 286-287: rebuild clears both button[data-field] and .archive-preset-pill before re-rendering.
keyCodeChanges.js_clearAll: Lines 225-229: Object.keys(presetFilters) loop restores hidden input values after clear, so preset terms reappear after buildButtons() runs.

conclusion: All 6 requirements PASS. The refactored single-container approach is correctly implemented: preset pills live inside .archive-active-filters as non-interactive spans alongside interactive user pills, displayFilters=false shows no pill UI at all (presets apply silently), Clear All correctly preserves presets, and the CSS :not(:has()) rule correctly gates bar visibility on pill presence.
